_comment: sovereign-os ux-design-audit dashboard (R492, R457+). Visualizes the operator-§1g UX-quality instrument that scores each module against the 6-dimension UX ladder. Sourced from sovereign_os_operator_ux_design_audit_query_total{verb,dimension,result} (Layer B, SDD-016) emitted by scripts/operator/ux-design-audit.py. Operator imports into Grafana via Settings → JSON Model. Closes the future ux-design-audit-dashboard waiver and registers ux-design-audit in MODULE_COVERAGE at 3 surfaces (core/cli/dashboard).

panels.title: dimensions verb (count)
panels.description: Enumerates the 6 dimensions in the §1g operator-named UX-quality ladder.

panels.title: audit verb (count)
panels.description: Per-module audit run — operator's 'is this module's UX high-quality?' verb.

panels.title: score verb (count)
panels.description: Numeric score (0..6) per module — composite UX quality.

panels.title: report verb (count)
panels.description: One-screen cross-module report — operator's daily UX rollup.

panels.title: ux-design-audit query rate per verb (5m)
panels.description: Per-verb query rate over time. dimensions / modules / audit / score / report / selfdef — operator's UX-tooling usage pattern.

panels.title: ux-design-audit dimension attention (5m)
panels.description: Per-dimension query rate. action-budget / discoverable / recoverable / next-step / operator-named / readable-30s — operator-revealed-preference signal for which UX axis is most-watched.

panels.title: ux-design-audit result distribution
panels.description: ok / unknown-module / issues — operator-§1g result-class breakdown across all verbs.

panels.title: ux-design-audit current state (verb × dimension × result)
panels.description: Per-(verb, dimension, result) histogram — operator-discoverable: 'which UX axis am I exercising most, and is it passing?'

options.content:
**Operator §1g verbatim** (sacrosanct):

> "We do not minimize anything."

Operator §1g UX rationale (R457):

> "reach the goal of the surface in N or fewer actions ... clear discovery ... recoverable mistakes ... discoverable next steps ... of quality"

This instrument scores each operator-§1g module against the 6-dimension UX-quality ladder. The score IS the operator's daily revealed-preference: low-scoring modules have shortened the UX delivery contract; high-scoring modules respect §1g.

**6-dimension UX ladder (sacrosanct, R457):**

1. `action-budget` — operator reaches goal in N (default 3) actions or fewer
   - operator-named: "reach the goal of the surface in N or fewer actions"
2. `discoverable` — surface enumerable from `sovereign-osctl` help
   - operator-named: "clear discovery"
3. `recoverable` — destructive ops are preview-before-apply (triple-gate)
   - operator-named: "recoverable mistakes"
4. `next-step` — verbs surface `next_action` / `next:` hints
   - operator-named: "discoverable next steps"
5. `operator-named` — operator's verbatim words preserved in module surface
   - operator-named: "operator-§1g sacrosanct verbatim discipline"
6. `readable-30s` — help text dense enough to read in 30s (≤500 chars)
   - operator-named: "of quality"

**Threshold:** 6/6. The UX ladder has NO partial-credit. A module scoring 5/6 has ONE silently-shortened axis — that IS minimization, and the operator wants the work.

**CLI:**

```
sovereign-osctl ux-design-audit dimensions          # enumerate 6
sovereign-osctl ux-design-audit modules             # list audited modules
sovereign-osctl ux-design-audit audit <module>      # per-module audit
sovereign-osctl ux-design-audit score <module>      # numeric 0..6
sovereign-osctl ux-design-audit report              # one-screen rollup
sovereign-osctl ux-design-audit selfdef             # cross-repo selfdef
```

**Metric:** `sovereign_os_operator_ux_design_audit_query_total{verb,dimension,result}` (SDD-016 Layer B)

**Source:** R457 shipped the 6-dimension instrument + 6 verbs. R492 (R457+) ships THIS dashboard + registers ux-design-audit as a first-class module in MODULE_COVERAGE at 3 surfaces (core/cli/dashboard).

**Standing operator rule (sacrosanct):**

> "We do not minimize anything."

title: sovereign-os ux-design-audit
